\tzpentry{ID5614}{Theta Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5614 introduces Theta Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \hat{\bm{n}}(t)=\bigl(\sin\Theta(t)\cos\Phi(t),\;\sin\Theta(t)\sin\Phi(t),\;\cos\Theta(t)\bigr), \end{equation}
